Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 204 

GAP_TIER_PARTIAL 

LABEL: Gap Tier Partial 

DESCRIPTION: For Part D plans with some cost sharing in the coverage gap phase (i.e., those where the variable 
GAP_TIER =“Y” [yes]), this variable indicates whether or not the cost sharing applies to a partial list of 
drugs. If only a limited number of drugs on the tier are covered during the coverage gap phase then 
the value will
